name: Chai-1
description: Predicts the 3D structure of proteins, rna, dna and small molecules. Handles covalent ligands and glycans, as well as restricting prediction based on distances between residues. Matches or outperforms AlphaFold3.
capabilities: Predicts the 3D structure of proteins, rna, dna and small molecules
Handles covalent ligands and glycans, as well as restricting prediction based on distances between residues

sequences.description: Array of entity objects. Each entity has a type (protein, rna, dna, or ligand) and corresponding sequence or SMILES.

sequence.description: Amino acid sequence for protein, nucleotide sequence for RNA/DNA

numSamples.description: Number of structure predictions to return

numRecycles.description: Number of recycling iterations for refinement

numDiffusionSteps.description: Number of diffusion steps, balancing accuracy with prediction time

useMSA.description: Whether to use multiple sequence alignment or run in single sequence mode

contactRestraints.description: Contact restraints between two residues specifying maximum distances for epitope-guided docking

pocketRestraints.description: Pocket restraints between a residue and a chain
